title: ホントの“アタシ”を求めて

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...You again? Look, this is getting annoying. What is it you want with
me, anyway?
choice_data_list: Just to hear what you have to say.
Just to hear what you have to say.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Who says I have anything to say?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: The thing is, I have nothing. Nothing. A pretty face, a dumb doll. That's me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Modeling was fun at first, you know. They'd ask me to look happy, or
strike a pose, and they'd heap on the praise when I did it. I was proud
of myself.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
They wanted a certain image from me, so that's what I modeled
myself after, what I performed.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But then one day, I was walking down the street, when I saw this huge
poster of myself. And I thought... "Who's that?"

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
"This image of perfection brought to life, like she was born to look
pretty. Who is that?"

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Didn't have to think twice to know the answer—"That's 'Gold City,'
duh."

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: The real question was... "Who's the one standing here staring at her? Who am I ?"

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: It scared me. I wanted to scream, and I just, I couldn't take it anymore.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: My mind just went blank and I took off running, and I ran and ran...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: And that's when I saw it... the sunset.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I legitimately had no clue where I was. And I tripped... I don't even
know how many times, my legs were caked in mud, my favorite dress
was in tatters...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But the sky, I don't know why, but it was just so pretty.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...And that's when it hits me. This—this is me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: My legs hurt like hell, and my lungs felt like they were about to burst, but it all just felt like me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: So I came to Tracen. To run and run, and to become me. To carve the real me into everyone's memory.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (The honk of a car horn cuts her off.)

text_block_list.name: Gold City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
City! Thank goodness you're here! Did you not get any of my calls?
Come on, you'll be late for work.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Manager... Sorry, we were, er, busy talking... Oh wow, yeah, that's a
lot of missed calls.

text_block_list.name: Gold City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
Well, whatever it was, I'm glad I found you. I assume something
happened with that trainer?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yeah, something like that. Sorry, uh, work. Right, let's go.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh, can we head back to the academy real quick though? I need to
reserve the training course.

text_block_list.name: Gold City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
...Listen, City. Don't you think it's about time to give it up? You're
worn out, both in body and mind. You've tried so, so hard. Isn't it
tiring?

text_block_list.name: Gold City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
You don't like people judging you by your looks, but that's just how it
is. You have to learn to accept it.

text_block_list.name: Gold City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
I'll make you a top model. You should be up on the stage where you'll
shine the brightest. Forcing yourself into a world where you don't
belong only brings pain.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
A world where I don't belong... Hah, maybe you're right. I thought I
was getting somewhere, and look at me now.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Maybe it's time to give up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Gold City slams the car door shut, and the engine revs up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For a moment, I just watch them drive off in a daze. But then, I notice
something on the ground.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The lock screen's set to a picture of a sunset. It's a bit blurry—her
hand must've been shaking. But still, it's a beautiful sight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I replay her words in my mind over and over. For her, running is a way
to become her true self.
choice_data_list: I should get this to her!

text_block_list.name: Gold City's Manager
text_block_list.text: City, wait here a moment. I'm going to go talk to the staff.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Mm, all right.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...Damn, okay. She got a big name photographer for this shoot. Bet
he'll make me look really pretty.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You know... Maybe this is where I belong after all.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait, you... Why... How?!
choice_data_list: You dropped your dream back there.
You dropped your dream back there.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: My dream? You're literally making zero sense.

As confusion crosses her face, I pull out the phone and show her the
lock screen.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Huuuh?! What the—Why do you have my phone?! And why were you
looking through it?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: That's not my dream! Not anymore—I quit already!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Give it back!
She snatches the phone from my hand.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'm done. I'm through. I'm giving up! And I'm deleting this picture!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'll delete it right here, right now! I swear, I'll... I'll delete it...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Why?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Why can't I just... press delete?
choice_data_list: You don't need to throw away the real "you."
You don't need to throw away the real "you."

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Who are you, anyway? Like honestly.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You're a nuisance, and a goody-two-shoes, and a stalker,
eavesdropper, phone peeper—you have zero tact, you're clingy, and
so, so damn annoying!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: First you just wanna hear me out, and now it's "don't throw yourself away!" You never make any fricking sense! Seriously, who the hell do you think you are?!
choice_data_list: Your trainer! If you'll have me.
Your trainer! If you'll have me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Ughhhhh, I am SO done with you!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Fine then. Do it! Be my trainer. We'll see how fast you can make me
run!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But I swear, treat me like a doll once, and I'll kick you so hard you'll regret ever talking to me!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What do you mean, "sounds good"?! Ugh, I can't.

text_block_list.name: Gold City's Manager
text_block_list.text: City, sorry to keep you waiting! Oh, uh... You must be...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Never mind that, I'll tell you later. We've got work to do. You, wait
here.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
My manager's kind of a helicopter, so I'll introduce you to her. As
my... my trainer.
